telegraph_text: Ships are starting to move, many loaded up with Oil, out of the Strait of Hormuz. They are going along the Southern "Highway," which is totally safe, secure, and pristine. There are other areas of travel, also!!! President DJT
mechanism: Trump publicly declares oil tankers safely transiting the Strait of Hormuz -> signals de-escalation and no supply disruption -> the war/closure risk premium in crude deflates -> oil ETFs fall.
polymarket_query: Strait of Hormuz closed or blocked in 2026
rationale: Mid-June 2026 context: heightened Iran/Hormuz tension had built an oil risk premium. A top-of-feed Trump post reassuring the market that tankers are moving freely and the route is 'totally safe' reads as de-escalation, which mechanically bleeds the geopolitical risk premium out of crude. Most direct expression is shorting crude-oil ETFs (USO for WTI, BNO for Brent). Reactive, fast-decaying signal, so a short holding window.
